DZBIP v1.0 — Live on Polygon Amoy

The sovereign identity
protocol for Web3.

Meta Go fuses zero-knowledge cryptography, biometric liveness, and Soulbound tokens into a single passwordless identity primitive — privacy-first, audit-ready, Metaverse-native.

Forge Your Identity See it in action

Facial landmarks

Biometric data stored

EIP-712

Liveness Active
468 / 468 landmarks

Core capabilities

Built on cryptography. Designed for humans.

Every layer of Meta Go enforces a single principle: you alone hold your identity, and you alone decide what to reveal.

Zero-Knowledge Biometrics

Prove your identity without revealing your face. 468-point FaceMesh hashed locally, then permanently discarded.

Soulbound Credentials

Non-transferable ERC-721 SBTs minted on Polygon. Identity that cannot be sold, traded, or stolen.

Multi-Factor Defense

Wallet + Face + Voice triple-modal biometric authentication. Bypass-resistant by cryptographic design.

Cross-Platform DIDs

W3C-compliant decentralized identifiers resolvable across Web3 services and EVM-compatible chains.

Liveness & Anti-Deepfake

Real-time eye-blink and depth analysis blocks photo, video, and AI-generated synthetic face attacks.

Client-Side Proof Generation

Groth16 zk-SNARK proofs computed entirely in your browser. No server ever sees your biometrics.

The Identity Forge

Five steps. Zero compromises.

01

Choose Handle

Reserve your unique username on the Meta Go network.

02

Connect Wallet

Sign-In With Ethereum verifies wallet ownership cryptographically.

03

Biometric Scan

TF.js FaceMesh maps your topology with liveness checks.

04

Voice MFA

Vocal frequency print becomes your second cryptographic factor.

05

Mint SBT

A non-transferable on-chain credential binds it all together.

Governance

Compliant by architecture.

Zero-storage biometrics means there is no PII to leak. We comply with global privacy regulations by design, not by policy.

GDPR Aligned

Zero raw biometric storage. Right to erasure satisfied by cryptographic primitive.

SOC2 Ready

Client-side prover, encrypted sessions, audit-grade event logging.

W3C DID Standard

Decentralized identifiers compatible with Verifiable Credentials.

Ready to claim your sovereign identity?

Join the Meta Go protocol in under 60 seconds. No passwords. No data leakage. Just math.

Get Started

Distributed Zero-Knowledge Biometric Identity Protocol
